title: fj-lax RFFT Bluestein half-spectrum prefix postprocess

source_revision.restored_diff_check: git diff -- crates/fj-lax/src/fft.rs produced no output

lever_tested.summary: Add a Bluestein prefix-output helper and route RFFT non-power-of-two rows to compute only the consumed Hermitian half-spectrum during the final chirp/write loop.

profile_basis.hotspot: Prime Bluestein RFFT remained much slower than adjacent mixed-radix RFFT after packed-real extraction was rejected.
profile_basis.fresh_baseline_command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-6srm2-baseline-2b0895c8-1715 cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- rfft_batch_64x1499_bluestein_f64 --sample-size 100

candidate.control_eval_rfft_batch_2048x256_f64_den: not rerun after target failed keep gate

ignored_cross_worker.reason: RCH ignored the requested ts1 preference from the main worktree and selected vmi1149989, so this reading was not used for keep scoring.

superseded_provisional.reason: Earlier same-worker evidence on the older 52dff6a3 baseline showed a small apparent win, but it was superseded by the fresh 2b0895c8 same-path A/B after main advanced.

behavior_proof.focused_rch_test: cargo test -p fj-lax --lib fft -- --nocapture passed 40/40 on the candidate during the proof run
behavior_proof.ordering: For kept k, the tested lever preserved the same Bluestein convolution, conv iteration order, chirp lookup, and final multiply/add expression order as the full-output path.
behavior_proof.floating_point: No reassociation, FMA substitution, mixed precision, or tolerance widening was introduced in the tested lever.
behavior_proof.golden_output: Existing FFT/RFFT golden digest tests passed in the focused proof run; source was restored after the failed performance gate.

validation.format: rustfmt --edition 2024 --check crates/fj-lax/src/fft.rs passed before source restore
validation.diff_check: git diff --check -- crates/fj-lax/src/fft.rs passed before source restore
validation.source_restored: git diff -- crates/fj-lax/src/fft.rs empty after rejection

next_primitive.name: RFFT-specific real-input Bluestein half-spectrum algorithm
next_primitive.direction: Replace the complex full-spectrum Bluestein row algorithm for real prime RFFT with a real-input/half-spectrum convolution primitive that avoids zero-imaginary work and unused second-half output work while preserving JAX-visible shape, dtype, row order, and golden digest behavior.
